changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `book_crawler_task` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `account` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '创建人账号', `task_name` VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL COMMENT '任务名称', `site_name` VARCHAR(120) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '站点名称', `book_name` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '书籍名称', `catalog_url` VARCHAR(1000) NOT NULL COMMENT '目录页地址', `chapter_link_selector` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '章节链接选择器', `chapter_title_selector` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '章节标题选择器', `content_selector` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '正文选择器', `content_remove_selectors` VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '正文清洗选择器', `start_chapter_num` INT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '起始章节序号', `end_chapter_num` INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '结束章节序号', `interval_seconds` INT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '章节抓取间隔秒数', `save_directory` VARCHAR(1000) NOT NULL COMMENT '保存目录', `status` TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '状态: 1-待执行 2-执行中 3-成功 4-部分失败 5-失败 6-已暂停', `total_chapters` INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '目标章节数', `success_chapters` INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '成功章节数', `failed_chapters` INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '失败章节数', `last_message` VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '最后执行消息', `last_start_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '最近开始时间', `last_finish_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '最近结束时间', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', `is_delete` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '删除标记', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_book_crawler_task_account` (`account`), KEY `idx_book_crawler_task_status` (`status`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='书籍爬虫任务表';

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `book_crawler_chapter` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `task_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '任务ID', `chapter_index` INT NOT NULL COMMENT '章节序号', `chapter_title` VARCHAR(300) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '章节标题', `chapter_url` VARCHAR(1000) NOT NULL COMMENT '章节地址', `save_path` VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '保存路径', `content_length` INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '内容长度', `crawl_status` TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '状态: 1-待抓取 2-成功 3-失败', `error_message` TEXT COMMENT '异常信息', `start_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '开始时间', `finish_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '结束时间', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), UNIQUE KEY `uk_book_crawler_chapter_task_index` (`task_id`, `chapter_index`), KEY `idx_book_crawler_chapter_status` (`crawl_status`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='书籍爬虫章节记录表';

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO miniapp (name, intro, icon, color, category, tag_type, route, external_link, sort_order, is_delete, create_time, update_time) SELECT '书籍爬虫', '按目录页规则抓取书籍章节，支持起止章节、间隔时间与本地目录保存', 'Search', '#2563EB', '效率工具', 'primary', '/index/bookCrawler', NULL, 9, 0, NOW(), NOW() FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM miniapp WHERE name = '书籍爬虫');
UPDATE miniapp SET intro = '按目录页规则抓取书籍章节，支持起止章节、间隔时间与本地目录保存', icon = 'Search', color = '#2563EB', category = '效率工具', tag_type = 'primary', route = '/index/bookCrawler', external_link = NULL, sort_order = 9, is_delete = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE name = '书籍爬虫';
